item.description: 2026年3月2日 - TZ日报 每日AI资讯聚合 | 更新时间：2026年3月2日 AI新闻 Hacker News I Built a Scheme Compiler with AI in 4 Days Article URL: https://matthewphillips.info/programming/posts/i-built-a-scheme-compiler-with-ai/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47208423 Points: 8 Comments: 3… 原文链接 Hacker News Why XML Tags Are So Fundamental to Claude Article URL: https://glthr.com/XML-fundamental-to-Claude Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47207236 Points: 53 Comments: 18… 原文链接 Hacker News AI Made Writing Code Easier. It Made Being an Engineer Harder Article URL: https://www.ivanturkovic.com/2026/02/25/ai-made-writing-code-easier-engineering-harder/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47206824 Points: 310

2026年3月2日 - TZ日报 每日AI资讯聚合 | 更新时间：2026年3月2日 AI新闻 Hacker News If AI writes code, should the session be part of the commit? Article URL: https://github.com/mandel-macaque/memento Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47212355 Points: 105 Comments: 126… 原文链接 Hacker News Show HN: Logira – eBPF runtime auditing for AI agent runs I started using Claude Code (claude –dangerously-skip-permissions) and Codex (codex –yolo) and realized I had no reliable way to know what they actually did. The agent’s own output tells you a story, but it’s the agent’s story.
